ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2025 Continued To May-06-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BEI STEEL, INC. MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

Defendants BEI Steel Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration is granted. Its motion to dismiss class claims is denied without prejudice; it will be for the arbitrator to apply the class waiver. The matter is stayed pending arbitration. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING)

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
